scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "bun run --cwd app/api dev" "bun run --cwd app/web dev"
scripts.typecheck: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "bun run --cwd app/api typecheck" "bun run --cwd app/web typecheck"
scripts.build: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "bun run --cwd app/api build" "bun run --cwd app/web build"
